title: BEM-1239 provider fixtures
objective:
Create file governance/tests/fixtures/provider_failover_positive_mock_e2e.json with content {"contour":"C1","mode":"mock_e2e"}
Create file governance/tests/fixtures/provider_activation_positive_c1.json with content {"contour":"C1"}
Create file governance/tests/run_provider_policy_fixture_tests.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runners.provider_failover import failover_for_contour
from governance.runners.provider_activation import provider_for_contour


def run():
    results = []
    positive_failover = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/provider_failover_positive_mock_e2e.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    fallback = failover_for_contour(positive_failover["contour"], positive_failover["mode"])
    results.append({"test":"mock_failover_allowed_for_mock_e2e","ok": fallback.get("ok") is True, "result": fallback})
    activation = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/provider_activation_positive_c1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    provider = provider_for_contour(activation["contour"])
    results.append({"test":"provider_activation_c1","ok": provider.get("ok") is True and provider.get("provider") == "gpt", "result": provider})
    prod = failover_for_contour("C1", "production")
    results.append({"test":"mock_failover_denied_for_production","ok": prod.get("ok") is False, "result": prod})
    return {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "release_pass": False, "results": results}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
